calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-21-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2022 Continued To Jul-13-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Anthony Ferreiro's unopposed motion to approve proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and a proposed judgment.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/SRB)
